Part.Source:
&ModuloSistemaMEU_CTE = RetornaEmpresaModulo.UDP(&EmpCod, ModuloSistema.MEU_CTE) &ModuloSistemaAGRONFE = RetornaEmpresaModulo.UDP(&EmpCod, ModuloSistema.AGRONFE)
Do Case Case &ModuloSistemaMEU_CTE = 'S' New //ENTRADA MERCADORIA EmpCod = &EmpCod LctCod = 1 LctNom = 'SERVICO DE TRANSPORTE' LctNatOpe = 'SERVICO DE TRANSPORTE' LctTip = TipoLancamento.SaidaMercadoria LctGerFin = Status_SimNao.Sim LctPagCom = Status_SimNao.Nao LctInfPrc = Status_SimNao.Sim LctTipCus = TipoCustoPedido.UltimaCompraFornecedor LctRetCus = Status_SimNao.Nao LctAtuFor = Status_SimNao.Sim LctBasImpCod = 1 LctAtuSal = Status_EntradaSaida.Saida LctAtuEst = Status_EntradaSaida.Saida LctAtuPro = Status_EntradaSaida.Nenhum LctAtuEstFis = Status_EntradaSaida.Saida LctPerCred = Status_SimNao.Nao LctGnre = Status_SimNao.Nao LctCalMin = Status_SimNao.Nao LctAprvICMS = 100 LctAprvIPI = 100 EndNew Commit atualizaFormulasOperacao.Call(&EmpCod, 1)
OtherWise
New //ENTRADA MERCADORIA EmpCod = &EmpCod LctCod = 1 LctNom = 'ENTRADA MERCADORIA' LctNatOpe = 'ENTRADA MERCADORIA' LctTip = TipoLancamento.EntradaMercadoria LctGerFin = Status_SimNao.Sim LctPagCom = Status_SimNao.Nao LctInfPrc = Status_SimNao.Sim LctTipCus = TipoCustoPedido.UltimaCompraFornecedor LctRetCus = Status_SimNao.Sim LctAtuFor = Status_SimNao.Sim LctBasImpCod = 1 LctAtuSal = Status_EntradaSaida.Entrada LctAtuEst = Status_EntradaSaida.Entrada LctAtuPro = Status_EntradaSaida.Nenhum LctAtuEstFis = Status_EntradaSaida.Entrada LctPerCred = Status_SimNao.Nao LctGnre = Status_SimNao.Nao LctCalMin = Status_SimNao.Nao LctAprvICMS = 100 LctAprvIPI = 100 EndNew Commit atualizaFormulasOperacao.Call(&EmpCod, 1)
New //SAIDA MERCADORIA EmpCod = &EmpCod LctCod = 2 LctNom = '5.101 - VENDA MERCADORIAS' LctNatOpe = 'VENDA MERCADORIAS' LctTip = TipoLancamento.SaidaMercadoria LctGerFin = Status_SimNao.Sim LctPagCom = Status_SimNao.Sim LctInfPrc = Status_SimNao.Nao LctTipCus = TipoCustoPedido.CustoNoProduto LctRetCus = Status_SimNao.Nao LctAtuFor = Status_SimNao.Nao LctBasImpCod = 2 LctAtuSal = Status_EntradaSaida.Saida LctAtuEst = Status_EntradaSaida.Saida LctAtuPro = Status_EntradaSaida.Nenhum LctAtuEstFis = Status_EntradaSaida.Saida LctAtuGra = Status_simNao_PS.SIM LctPerCred = Status_SimNao.Sim LctGnre = Status_SimNao.Sim LctCalMin = Status_SimNao.Sim LctAprvICMS = 100 LctAprvIPI = 100 EndNew Commit atualizaFormulasOperacao.Call(&EmpCod, 2)
If &ModuloSistemaAGRONFE = 'S' New //VENDA/SERVICOS EmpCod = &EmpCod LctCod = 3 LctNom = '5.453 - RETORNO DE ANIMAL SISTEMA DE INT. E PARC. RURAL' LctNatOpe = 'RETORNO DE ANIMAL SISTEMA DE INT. E PARC. RURAL' LctTip = TipoLancamento.SaidaMercadoria LctGerFin = Status_SimNao.Sim LctPagCom = Status_SimNao.Sim LctInfPrc = Status_SimNao.Nao LctTipCus = TipoCustoPedido.CustoNoProduto LctRetCus = Status_SimNao.Nao LctAtuFor = Status_SimNao.Nao LctBasImpCod = 3 LctAtuSal = Status_EntradaSaida.Saida LctAtuEst = Status_EntradaSaida.Saida LctAtuPro = Status_EntradaSaida.Nenhum LctAtuEstFis = Status_EntradaSaida.Saida LctPerCred = Status_SimNao.Sim LctGnre = Status_SimNao.Sim LctAtuGra = Status_simNao_PS.SIM LctCalMin = Status_SimNao.Sim LctAprvICMS = 100 LctAprvIPI = 100 EndNew Commit atualizaFormulasOperacao.Call(&EmpCod, 3)
New //VENDA/SERVICOS EmpCod = &EmpCod LctCod = 4 LctNom = '5.455 - RETORNO DE INSUMOS NAO UTIL. NA PROD. SISTEMA DE INT. E PARCERIA RURAL' LctNatOpe = 'RETORNO DE INSUMOS NAO UTIL. NA PROD. SISTEMA DE INT. E PARCERIA RURAL' LctTip = TipoLancamento.SaidaMercadoria LctGerFin = Status_SimNao.Sim LctPagCom = Status_SimNao.Sim LctInfPrc = Status_SimNao.Nao LctTipCus = TipoCustoPedido.CustoNoProduto LctRetCus = Status_SimNao.Nao LctAtuFor = Status_SimNao.Nao LctBasImpCod = 4 LctAtuSal = Status_EntradaSaida.Saida LctAtuEst = Status_EntradaSaida.Saida LctAtuPro = Status_EntradaSaida.Nenhum LctAtuEstFis = Status_EntradaSaida.Saida LctPerCred = Status_SimNao.Sim LctGnre = Status_SimNao.Sim LctAtuGra = Status_simNao_PS.SIM LctCalMin = Status_SimNao.Sim LctAprvICMS = 100 LctAprvIPI = 100 EndNew Commit atualizaFormulasOperacao.Call(&EmpCod, 4)
New //VENDA/SERVICOS EmpCod = &EmpCod LctCod = 5 LctNom = '1.201 - DEVOLUCAO DE VENDA' LctNatOpe = 'DEVOLUCAO DE VENDA' LctTip = TipoLancamento.DevolucaoVenda LctGerFin = Status_SimNao.Nao LctPagCom = Status_SimNao.Nao LctInfPrc = Status_SimNao.Nao LctTipCus = TipoCustoPedido.CustoNoProduto LctRetCus = Status_SimNao.Nao LctAtuFor = Status_SimNao.Nao LctBasImpCod = 5 LctAtuSal = Status_EntradaSaida.Entrada LctAtuEst = Status_EntradaSaida.Entrada LctAtuPro = Status_EntradaSaida.Nenhum LctAtuEstFis = Status_EntradaSaida.Entrada LctPerCred = Status_SimNao.Sim LctGnre = Status_SimNao.Sim LctAtuGra = Status_simNao_PS.SIM LctCalMin = Status_SimNao.Sim LctAprvICMS = 100 LctAprvIPI = 100 EndNew Commit atualizaFormulasOperacao.Call(&EmpCod, 5) Else
New //VENDA/SERVICOS EmpCod = &EmpCod LctCod = 3 LctNom = 'VENDA/SERVICOS' LctNatOpe = 'VENDA/SERVICOS' LctTip = TipoLancamento.SaidaMercadoria LctGerFin = Status_SimNao.Sim LctPagCom = Status_SimNao.Sim LctInfPrc = Status_SimNao.Nao LctTipCus = TipoCustoPedido.CustoNoProduto LctRetCus = Status_SimNao.Nao LctAtuFor = Status_SimNao.Nao LctBasImpCod = 3 LctAtuSal = Status_EntradaSaida.Saida LctAtuEst = Status_EntradaSaida.Saida LctAtuPro = Status_EntradaSaida.Nenhum LctAtuEstFis = Status_EntradaSaida.Saida LctPerCred = Status_SimNao.Sim LctGnre = Status_SimNao.Sim LctAtuGra = Status_simNao_PS.SIM LctCalMin = Status_SimNao.Sim LctAprvICMS = 100 LctAprvIPI = 100 EndNew Commit atualizaFormulasOperacao.Call(&EmpCod, 3) Endif
New //SAIDA MERCADORIA EmpCod = &EmpCod LctCod = 8 LctNom = 'ORÇAMENTO VENDA' LctNatOpe = 'ORÇAMENTO VENDA' LctTip = TipoLancamento.OrcamentoVenda LctGerFin = Status_SimNao.Nao LctPagCom = Status_SimNao.Nao LctInfPrc = Status_SimNao.Nao LctTipCus = TipoCustoPedido.CustoNoProduto LctRetCus = Status_SimNao.Nao LctAtuFor = Status_SimNao.Nao LctBasImpCod = 2 LctAtuSal = Status_EntradaSaida.Saida LctAtuEst = Status_EntradaSaida.Nenhum LctAtuPro = Status_EntradaSaida.Nenhum LctAtuEstFis = Status_EntradaSaida.Nenhum LctPerCred = Status_SimNao.Sim LctGnre = Status_SimNao.Sim LctCalMin = Status_SimNao.Nao LctAprvICMS = 100 LctAprvIPI = 100 EndNew Commit atualizaFormulasOperacao.Call(&EmpCod, 8)
New //SAIDA MATERIA PRIMA PRODUCAO EmpCod = &EmpCod LctCod = 11 LctNom = 'SAIDA MATERIA PRIMA PRODUCAO' LctNatOpe = 'SAIDA MATERIA PRIMA PRODUCAO' LctTip = TipoLancamento.MovimentacaoValores LctGerFin = Status_SimNao.Nao LctPagCom = Status_SimNao.Nao LctInfPrc = Status_SimNao.Nao LctTipCus = TipoCustoPedido.CustoNoProduto LctRetCus = Status_SimNao.Nao LctAtuFor = Status_SimNao.Nao LctBasImpCod = 11 LctAtuSal = Status_EntradaSaida.Nenhum LctAtuEst = Status_EntradaSaida.Saida LctAtuPro = Status_EntradaSaida.Nenhum LctAtuEstFis = Status_EntradaSaida.Nenhum LctPerCred = Status_SimNao.Nao LctGnre = Status_SimNao.Nao LctCalMin = Status_SimNao.Sim LctAprvICMS = 100 LctAprvIPI = 100 EndNew atualizaFormulasOperacao.Call(&EmpCod, 11)
New //ORDEM DE PRODUCAO EmpCod = &EmpCod LctCod = 51 LctNom = 'ORDEM DE PRODUCAO' LctNatOpe = 'ORDEM DE PRODUCAO' LctTip = TipoLancamento.MovimentacaoValores LctGerFin = Status_SimNao.Nao LctPagCom = Status_SimNao.Nao LctInfPrc = Status_SimNao.Nao LctTipCus = TipoCustoPedido.CustoNoProduto LctRetCus = Status_SimNao.Sim LctAtuFor = Status_SimNao.Nao LctBasImpCod = 51 LctAtuSal = Status_EntradaSaida.Nenhum LctAtuEst = Status_EntradaSaida.Nenhum LctAtuPro = Status_EntradaSaida.Entrada LctPerCred = Status_SimNao.Nao LctGnre = Status_SimNao.Nao LctCalMin = Status_SimNao.Nao LctAprvICMS = 100 LctAprvIPI = 100 EndNew atualizaFormulasOperacao.Call(&EmpCod, 51)
New //ENTRADA DA PRODUCAO EmpCod = &EmpCod LctCod = 53 LctNom = 'ENTRADA DA PRODUCAO' LctNatOpe = 'ENTRADA DA PRODUCAO' LctTip = TipoLancamento.MovimentacaoValores LctGerFin = Status_SimNao.Nao LctPagCom = Status_SimNao.Nao LctInfPrc = Status_SimNao.Nao LctTipCus = TipoCustoPedido.CustoNoProduto LctRetCus = Status_SimNao.Sim LctAtuFor = Status_SimNao.Nao LctBasImpCod = 53 LctAtuSal = Status_EntradaSaida.Entrada LctAtuEst = Status_EntradaSaida.Entrada LctAtuPro = Status_EntradaSaida.Saida LctPerCred = Status_SimNao.Nao LctGnre = Status_SimNao.Nao LctCalMin = Status_SimNao.Nao LctAprvICMS = 100 LctAprvIPI = 100 EndNew Commit atualizaFormulasOperacao.Call(&EmpCod, 53)
New //BALANCO EmpCod = &EmpCod LctCod = 99 LctNom = 'BALANCO' LctNatOpe = 'BALANCO' LctTip = TipoLancamento.MovimentacaoValores LctGerFin = Status_SimNao.Nao LctPagCom = Status_SimNao.Nao LctInfPrc = Status_SimNao.Nao LctTipCus = TipoCustoPedido.CustoNoProduto LctRetCus = Status_SimNao.Sim LctAtuFor = Status_SimNao.Nao LctBasImpCod = 99 LctAtuSal = Status_EntradaSaida.nenhum LctAtuEst = Status_EntradaSaida.Entrada LctAtuPro = Status_EntradaSaida.Nenhum LctPerCred = Status_SimNao.Nao LctGnre = Status_SimNao.Nao LctCalMin = Status_SimNao.Nao LctAprvICMS = 100 LctAprvIPI = 100 EndNew Commit atualizaFormulasOperacao.Call(&EmpCod, 99) EndCase
